gxcr_ipsec_sa_t Struct Reference
[IPsec API (gxcr/ipsec.h)]

Data structure that encapsulates a pointer to the memory that is to be used with shim for the metadata, and the information about where the token and the context record fields are within that memory. More...


Data Fields

unsigned char * metadata_mem
 Pointer to the gxio-registered I/O memory in which this data resides.
gxcr_token_info_t token_info
 Internal information needed by this SA.
bool explicit_iv_from_prng
 True if the explicit IV for outbound packets is to be generated automatically from the engine's pseudo-random number generator.
gxcr_cipher_t cipher
 Cipher algorithm.

Detailed Description

Data structure that encapsulates a pointer to the memory that is to be used with shim for the metadata, and the information about where the token and the context record fields are within that memory.

This is not for direct use by the user.

Field Documentation

unsigned char* gxcr_ipsec_sa_t::metadata_mem

Pointer to the gxio-registered I/O memory in which this data resides.

gxcr_token_info_t gxcr_ipsec_sa_t::token_info

Internal information needed by this SA.

bool gxcr_ipsec_sa_t::explicit_iv_from_prng

True if the explicit IV for outbound packets is to be generated automatically from the engine's pseudo-random number generator.

If false the IV must be provided by the user in the context record.

gxcr_cipher_t gxcr_ipsec_sa_t::cipher

Cipher algorithm.
